creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have looked on the patch briefly, and I have few questions:
- can you make up a patch that converts all ports to new semantics wrt
  USE_TCL/USE_TK now providing lib instead of run dependency
- TK_NO_RUN_DEPENDS seems superfluous when we have USE_TK_BUILD, no?

-- 
Pav Lucistnik <pav@oook.cz>
              <pav@FreeBSD.org>

Just because you're an angel doesn't mean you have to be a fool.
